title: McpGddTools
description: Combined manifest of all gdd-mcp tool input+output schemas (Plan 27.7-02 will populate the 12 read-only tools). Individual tool schemas live under scripts/mcp-servers/gdd-mcp/schemas/ and the tool handlers reference them; this combined schema exists so downstream validators and codegen can compile a single surface (D-11).

tools.description: Per-tool input/output schemas keyed by tool name (e.g. gdd_status, gdd_phase_current, gdd_phases_list, gdd_plans_list, gdd_decisions_list, gdd_intel_get, gdd_telemetry_query, gdd_cycle_recap, gdd_reflections_latest, gdd_learnings_digest, gdd_events_tail, gdd_health). Plan 27.7-02 populates entries.

input.description: JSON Schema fragment describing the tool's input parameters.

output.description: JSON Schema fragment describing the tool's response envelope.
